title: Water Seven Turns Hostile
description: Water Seven turns against the Straw Hats as Robin’s disappearance and Iceburg’s attack make the crew appear guilty.
scene: Across pages 17, 18, this part follows Luffy, Nico Robin, Nami, Zoro, Sanji. Water Seven turns against the Straw Hats as Robin’s disappearance and Iceburg’s attack make the crew appear guilty.

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: How did you find us, chopper?

dialogue.speaker: Franky
dialogue.text: And then you got us spotted, too!

dialogue.speaker: Galley-La shipwright
dialogue.text: It's impossible to stay out of sight...

dialogue.speaker: Water Seven citizen
dialogue.text: It's time for everyone to wake up...

dialogue.speaker: Nico Robin
dialogue.text: Nico Robin started out as our enemy,

dialogue.speaker: Franky
dialogue.text: Then we let her on our ship.

summary: Water Seven turns against the Straw Hats as Robin’s disappearance and Iceburg’s attack make the crew appear guilty.
